market_context: Market sentiment on X/Twitter is cautiously optimistic, with many users discussing potential upside due to expected tech sector earnings. Pre-market futures for S&P 500 and Nasdaq are up slightly by 0.3% and 0.5% respectively, while notable movers include tech giants like AAPL and NVDA showing pre-market gains.

predictions.reasoning: Positive sentiment on X/Twitter regarding tech earnings is driving optimism for broader market indices. Pre-market futures for S&P 500 are up 0.3% as reported by Bloomberg data accessed via web search. However, uncertainty remains due to potential geopolitical news later today.

NVDA is showing strong pre-market gains of 1.2% based on Yahoo Finance data accessed via web search. X/Twitter sentiment is bullish with high mention volume around AI sector growth. Options flow indicates heavy call buying for March expirations.

AAPL is up 0.8% in pre-market trading per web search on MarketWatch. Positive buzz on X/Twitter around a rumored product launch event is contributing to upside sentiment. Confidence is tempered by lack of official confirmation of the event.
